pianosProfile.designStatement: Creating vibrant community spaces through art

phwbPrograms.name: Healing Harmonies Concert Series
phwbPrograms.goals: Provide therapeutic music experiences to improve patient wellbeing

publicHealthProfile.bio: Stephanie Bonk is a violinist and educator committed to bringing music to unconventional places around NYC and Long Island.

Australian classical guitarist Rupert Boyd is regarded as one of the finest guitarists of his generation, having been described by Gramophone as “a very fine musician” and by The Washington Post as “truly evocative”, and has performed across four continents, from New York’s Carnegie Hall, to festivals in Europe, China, India, Nepal, the Philippines, New Zealand and Australia.
Shinjoo Cho is a bandoneonist, composer, and educator dedicated to the music of Argentina and creating new music.
Master Jazz and Blues guitarist

publicHealthProfile.instrument: Accordion, Acoustic Guitar, Electric Bass, Piano
publicHealthProfile.bio: CORDEONE began his journey playing Portuguese Balls at the tender age of 9. He is a multi-instrumentalist who, starting with the accordion, taught himself to play piano, classic guitar, Portuguese guitar, Brazilian percussions, drums, and the bass. At the age of 18, he embarked on a professional career in music.
Amy Domingues is a cellist, viola da gamba player, composer, and historical music specialist based in Washington DC.

publicHealthProfile.sightReadingLevel: I am confident sight-reading fully notated sheet music.
publicHealthProfile.bio: Tina Fabrique is an acclaimed actress and singer whose Broadway credits include Gospel at Colonus, Bring In ’da Noise, Bring In ’da Funk, and Ragtime.
publicHealthProfile.healthcareExperience: I spent many years with Hospital Audiences, Inc. (HAI), bringing concerts and bedside performances to the healthcare community across New York

publicHealthProfile.bio: RICK GERMANSON has been a highly in-demand pianist on the New York City Jazz scene for well over a decade, and has performed throughout the world at the top festivals, concert halls and clubs.
Latin GRAMMY Award winning composer and bassist.

publicHealthProfile.bio: Chris Hemingway is a freelance musician in New York City

publicHealthProfile.bio: An innovative Haitian-American violinist, exploring authentic self-expression through jazz improvisation.

artists.race: Two or more races (Not Hispanic or Latino)

publicHealthProfile.bio: Alberta Khoury is a classical guitarist and composer who loves to collaborate with others and share music in communities.
Kim Lake, singer, composer, film artist, has performed with artists such as, The Roots, MeShell Ndegeocello,, Marc Cary and others.
Emily Lenck is a freelance violinist who has performed and recorded for artists including The Temptations, Deadmau5, Smokey Robinson, and Chappell Roan.

publicHealthProfile.sightReadingLevel: I am confident sight-reading fully notated sheet music.
publicHealthProfile.bio: Gabriele Leite was the first classical guitarist listed in the Forbes magazine Brazil under 30 edition 2021. Gabriele is pursuing a DMA in Music Performance at the Stony Brook University. In 2024 the guitarist went on tour across Brazil and was nominated for the Brazilian Music Award in the Best New Artist category.  Since April 2020 she has been sponsored by Augustine Strings.

publicHealthProfile.sightReadingLevel: I am confident sight-reading chord charts or lead sheets.
publicHealthProfile.bio: Eduardo Gutterres is a multi-awarded Brazilian guitarist, dedicated performer, and educator who is passionate about collaborating with other musicians and creating memorable concert experiences for his audience.

employmentRecord.jobTitle: PLNO - PROJECT LEADER SFH PIANOS NEW ORLEANS

publicHealthProfile.bio: Erica Mancini is a multi-dimensional performer who specializes in playing many styles on the accordion throughout New York City in various ensembles, and also as a solo artist.

artists.race: Two or more races (Not Hispanic or Latino)

publicHealthProfile.bio: Hasan Bakr is a Multi Percussionist, Singer and Composer who’s career spans five decades.
Based in NYC, pianist Jun Cho currently works at the Juilliard School and a newly appointed professor of piano at Syracuse University.

publicHealthProfile.sightReadingLevel: I am confident sight-reading chord charts or lead sheets.
publicHealthProfile.ensembles: Rachel Therrien Latin Jazz Ensemble, Berta Moreno Ensemble
publicHealthProfile.bio: Camila Cortina is a Cuban-born pianist, composer and educator whose music bridges Afro-Cuban traditions with jazz, classical, and global sounds.

Kely Pinheiro, a Brazilian cellist with over a decade of experience, is a Berklee graduate who toured Europe with Astrid S and served as Assistant Music Director for Broadway's Hadestown. Now at New Jersey City University, she continues to bridge classical and contemporary music styles.

publicHealthProfile.sightReadingLevel: I am confident sight-reading chord charts or lead sheets.

artists.middleName: tabla player and percussionist experienced in many different genres.,https://www.trippdudley.com,@takademitrippy,@groovelessons
artists.firstName: assisted living facilities and schools.  Ive also taught privately and facilitated workshops for years.,https://api.typeform.com/responses/files/3bb9cf7ec488fc50295d75ae6a8ffb80cd7c30ff8d999a634f095f5708a12295/20190917_Jai_Jagdeesh_62.jpg,Drummer

publicHealthProfile.bio: Eric Yves Garcia is an award-winning singer/pianist in residence at The Pierre Hotel on 5th Avenue, a mainstay in NYC and London stages and “… a handsome young singer and pianist with a genuine star quality.” (The New York Times) .
Born and raised in Nagoya, Japan, Martha Kato is a pianist, composer and arranger in her blossoming career in New York.
